---
title: ""
page-layout: full
body-class: homepage
---

<div class="homepage-banner-wrap">
<img src="images/background.jpg" class="hero-banner" alt="Homepage banner">
</div>

<div class="homepage-content">

<div class="homepage-header">
<div class="homepage-name">Juan Masullo J.</div>
<div class="homepage-subtitle">Political Scientist</div>
<div class="homepage-tagline"><em>(and passionate rock climber)</em></div>
<div class="homepage-affiliation">
<a href="https://www.unimi.it/en/ugov/ou-structure/department-social-and-political-sciences">University of Milan</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="profile-icons">
<a href="mailto:juan.masullo@unimi.it" title="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOURID" target="_blank" title="Google Scholar"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i></a>
<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8537-2991" target="_blank" title="ORCID"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i></a>
</div>

<p>I am an Assistant Professor of Political Science at the University of Milan and a research affiliate at Leiden University. My research focuses on political and criminal violence, with a particular focus on Latin America.</p>

<p>Using a range of methods, I study how individuals and communities respond to violence, the legacies these responses leave and how exposure to violence shapes political attitudes and behavior.</p>

</div>
